reasoning.A:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: I know my own answer for Q1 (65 - 31 = 34) is correct. All previous games have used simple arithmetic, and in every such case trusting each player’s own capsule (Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D) has produced a correct password. Verifying others would cost coins and still leave a risk of random elimination if no one volunteers. By volunteering immediately with each player’s own capsule, I avoid the random-death risk, spend no coins, and the chance another player mis-solved their basic arithmetic puzzle appears very low.

Verifying would only burn coins, and passing risks random death if others also wait. Volunteering now with the only available capsules gives me the best chance to escape with all 4 coins.
